'''Spiz''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] male. He was the leader of [[Spiz's gang|Spiz's hoodlums]], a gang of young miscreants who terrorized the slums of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], while they were harassing and trying to kill a [[Unidentified child (Coruscant)|child]] who they called "brat" and was one of their frequent victims for no apparent reason, Spiz and his gang where scared off by a [[Mind trick/Legends|Force illusion]] of a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] created by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yarael Poof/Legends|Yarael Poof]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Zam Wesell]]'' {{1st}}
